properties.query: SELECT * FROM course c JOIN instructor u ON c.instructor_id = u.instructor_id WHERE u.instructor_id = ?
select course_id from course where instructor_id = ?
INSERT INTO course (title, description, price, created_at, instructor_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)
INSERT INTO section (title, video_url, material_url, created_at, course_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)
DELETE FROM course WHERE course_id = ? AND instructor_id = ?
